name: StableLM Zephyr 3B
license: Stability AI Community License (non-commercial by default; commercial use requires Stability AI membership)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer, DPO-tuned from StableLM-3B-4E1T
note: DPO-tuned chat model (UltraFeedback-style mix) on StableLM-3B-4E1T; capable assistant aimed at edge-device deployment.

results.notes: AI2 Reasoning Challenge (25-Shot), Open LLM Leaderboard, from the model-index metadata embedded in the HF README.md.
TruthfulQA (0-shot, mc2), Open LLM Leaderboard, from the model-index metadata embedded in the HF README.md.
'BigBench (Avg)' row of the 'Other benchmarks' table in the official HF model card README.
'AGI Benchmark (Avg)' row of the 'Other benchmarks' table in the official HF model card README (maps to the AGIEval benchmark).
AlpacaEval win rate (%) for the DPO variant, from the MT-Bench/AlpacaEval comparison table in the official HF model card README.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via direct fetch of huggingface.co/stabilityai/stablelm-zephyr-3b: 3B (2.8B) params, Stability AI Community License (commercial use requires membership reference to stability.ai/license), verbatim match. Release date Dec 7, 2023 corroborated by VentureBeat, Stability AI's own announcement blog, and Maginative coverage (license file itself dated Dec 6, 2023, announcement/release Dec 7). All 5 benchmark rows (MT-Bench 6.64, MMLU 46.17, HellaSwag 74.16, GSM8K 42.15, WinoGrande 65.51) verified literally on the HF page. Context length (4096) inherited from base model stablelm-3b-4e1t, not independently reprinted on the Zephyr card, so left as originally specified. No changes made to input values.
